Pikafish WebAssembly distribution notice
=========================================

Pikafish is Copyright (C) the Pikafish developers and is distributed under
the GNU General Public License version 3. See COPYING.txt in this directory.

Upstream source:
https://github.com/official-pikafish/Pikafish

This browser build (pikafish.js, pikafish.wasm and pikafish.data) is vendored
unchanged from:
https://github.com/dffge552/xiangqi-pwa-offline/commit/5450fdd43d269c97e44fef5ea2f4ebe6fd205748

That pinned repository revision is the source and provenance reference for the
distributed WebAssembly build. The wrapper in ../../src/pikafish-worker.js and
../../src/pikafish.js is original KanBlog code and communicates with the engine
through its UCI command interface.

SHA-256:
pikafish.data  eff217ee3cbfce0edca070601ca554628962cf5619249fb92ddb6afb0fbe5d77
pikafish.js    9260f80f642ad1798e66409363af6295df8216e2472ebc518d37bfed942dcd0c
pikafish.wasm  aed4a8fe1eee79a1b7b5deedf8be8333fd1241b05b236f3a19174bbbd36f24ec
